# feat(kaizen): wire TraceExporter into BaseAgent hot path

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `ad51109a9e9e` — feat(kaizen): wire TraceExporter into BaseAgent hot path

**Body**:

Adds BaseAgent.attach_trace_exporter() + trace_exporter property, and
AgentLoop.run_sync/run_async emit agent.run.start/agent.run.end
TraceEvent records through the attached exporter. Closes
rules/orphan-detection.md §1 for kaizen.observability — the facade
now has a production call site inside the framework's execution hot
path, not just in tests or downstream consumers.

Emission is fire-and-forget: exporter failures WARN-log and continue
(rules/observability.md Rule 7 carve-out for observability side
paths). The agent operation itself MUST NOT break because a trace
sink failed.

PR#6 of issue #567.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
